title: Plants Vs Zombies Replanted
description: A Plants Vs Zombies Mod that aims to be as accurate to the original game as possible.
body:
Plants Vs Zombies Replanted is a mod that attempts to bring Plants Vs Zombies into Minecraft's Survival Expierence. 49 plants and 23 Zombies, Functional Zen Garden to grow plants for defense, Currency and Shop System, Functional Lawnmowers/Pool Cleaners/Roof Cleaners, Sun System - Drops from the sky too!, Functional Sun Counter, Craftable Fertilizer or buy it, Grid Lawn Blocks, Zen Garden Pots, Wave System, Flexable Configurations, And More!

Some basic Zombies spawn naturally in the world. They will try to invade your house during downtime between Waves (Zombies will not naturally spawn during waves). Waves are activated in Crazy Dave's GUI - nighttime causes Gravestones. Gravestones can spawn random zombies depending on how far you progressed. Defeating a Flag Zombie at the end of the wave will unlock a new plant and give you a Money Bag which rewards you with random amount of Silver and Gold Coins and a small chance for a Gem.

To start progress - You need to make a Zen Garden pot (or find one by chance in the Villager Botanist's house that can be enabled in the Gamerules before World Gen.) Afterwards you take the 3 Peapods (1 if you enable infinite seedpackets) and right click on the Zen Garden pot. It'll plant Peashooters that you need to grow and buy Empty Seedpackets from Crazy Dave to collect when they glow indicating they're fully grown. You can also sell plants buy going to Crazy Dave's GUI and getting the Sell Plant item and right clicking on the Plant you want to sell. Depending on how far you grow it will change the amount of money you get from the Plant's Price Value in the shop.
